from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import json
import pathlib
import sys

from .core import DelegationRunner, Hub, HubError, load_payload_b64


def default_config_path() -> pathlib.Path:
    return pathlib.Path.home() / ".config" / "moreno-unified-delegator" / "config.json"


def parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
    root = argparse.ArgumentParser(prog="moreno-delegate")
    root.add_argument("--config", type=pathlib.Path, default=default_config_path())
    sub = root.add_subparsers(dest="command", required=True)

    submit = sub.add_parser("submit")
    submit.add_argument("instruction")
    submit.add_argument("--origin", default="terminal")

    status = sub.add_parser("status")
    status.add_argument("--job-id")

    sub.add_parser("current")
    sub.add_parser("doctor")

    decision = sub.add_parser("decision")
    decision.add_argument("decision", choices=["approve", "reject", "cancel", "request_revision"])
    decision.add_argument("--job-id")
    decision.add_argument("--note", default="")

    n8n = sub.add_parser("n8n")
    n8n.add_argument("--payload-b64", required=True)

    runner = sub.add_parser("_run")
    runner.add_argument("job_id")
    return root


def emit(data: object) -> None:
    print(json.dumps(data, sort_keys=True, ensure_ascii=False))


def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int:
    args = parser().parse_args(argv)
    executable = pathlib.Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] / "moreno-delegate"
    try:
        hub = Hub(args.config.expanduser())
        if args.command == "submit":
            emit(hub.submit({"instruction": args.instruction, "origin": args.origin}, executable))
        elif args.command == "status":
            emit(hub.status(args.job_id))
        elif args.command == "current":
            emit(hub.status())
        elif args.command == "doctor":
            emit(hub.doctor())
        elif args.command == "decision":
            emit(hub.decision({"decision": args.decision, "job_id": args.job_id, "note": args.note}))
        elif args.command == "n8n":
            emit(hub.handle_n8n(load_payload_b64(args.payload_b64), executable))
        elif args.command == "_run":
            DelegationRunner(hub.config, hub.store).run(args.job_id)
        else:
            raise HubError(f"Unsupported command: {args.command}")
        return 0
    except HubError as exc:
        emit({"ok": False, "error": str(exc)})
        return 2
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
        emit({"ok": False, "error": f"Unexpected error: {exc}"})
        return 1


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
